creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
Created attachment 242449
Update patch

FreeRADIUS 3.2.3 was released yesterday (26-05-2023). It looks like they forgot about FreeBSD this time so I had to create an extra patch. Let's hope it will get fixed upstream before 3.2.4. Enabling REDIS adds rlm_cache_redis, so it's now enabled together with rlm_redis.
I am running this version of FreeRADIUS for an hour without issues.
